name: Whitney Houston
bio: Whitney Houston's catalog remains commercially powerful because it combines major vocal-pop standards, soundtrack-era classics, and deep multi-generational familiarity.
notable_for: One of the defining vocal catalogs of modern pop and R&B, anchored by soundtrack and crossover hits.
career_highlight: I Will Always Love You remains one of the strongest long-tail ballad recordings in global catalog economics.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Whitney Houston's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Whitney Houston's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
